calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ivery Hammond appeared in court in propria persona.

Mr. Hammond stated that he called the San Francisco BAR Association, that he told them that he does not need representation, but he needs help filling out the proper forms, and that this is a no access case, but it is for a burial procedure. Mr. Hammond also stated that the funeral company is requesting letters in order to bury Mr. Adams. The Probate Examiner suggested that Mr. Hammond look into obtaining special letters. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Continued To Aug-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Petitioner Ivery Hammond, Jr., to appear on August 25,2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why no response to the Examiner's notes has been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.
